Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **********************************************************

Contents:

- Construction of a substitution system from an initial algebra
- Proof that the substitution system constructed from an initial algebra is an initial substitution system

This file differs from LiftingInitial.v in the hypotheses. Here we use omega cocontinuity instead of
Kan extensions.

Written by: Anders Mörtberg, 2016 (adapted from LiftingInitial.v)

************************************************************)

Set Kernel Term Sharing.

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.All.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.yoneda.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.HorizontalComposition.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctorsComposition.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SubstitutionSystems.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.GenMendlerIteration_alt.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.BicatOfCatsElementary.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Notation.
Local Open Scope subsys.

Local Open Scope cat.

Local Coercion alg_carrier : algebra_ob >-> ob.

Section category_Algebra.

Context (C : category) (CP : BinCoproducts C)
        (IC : Initial C) (CC : Colims_of_shape nat_graph C).

Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .
Local Notation "'Ptd'" := (category_Ptd C).

Let CPEndC : BinCoproducts EndC := BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CP.
Let EndEndC := [EndC, EndC].
Let CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
Initial [C, C]


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
Initial [C, C]

apply Initial_functor_precat, IC.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape nat_graph [C, C]


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape nat_graph [C, C]

apply ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape, CC.
Defined.

Section fix_an_H.

  Context (H : functor [C, C] [C, C]) (HH : is_omega_cocont H).

  Let Const_plus_H (X : EndC) : functor EndC EndC := Const_plus_H C CP H X.

  Let Id_H : functor [C, C] [C, C] := Id_H C CP H.

  Let Alg : precategory := FunctorAlg Id_H.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
X: [C, C]
is_omega_cocont (Const_plus_H X)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
X: [C, C]
is_omega_cocont (Const_plus_H X)

CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
X: [C, C]
is_omega_cocont (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] X)

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

is_omega_cocont H

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
X: [C, C]
is_omega_cocont (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] X)
 apply is_omega_cocont_constant_functor.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
X: [C, C]
is_omega_cocont H
 apply HH.
Defined.

Definition is_omega_cocont_Id_H : is_omega_cocont Id_H := is_omega_cocont_Const_plus_H (functor_identity C).

Definition InitAlg : Alg :=
  InitialObject (colimAlgInitial InitialEndC is_omega_cocont_Id_H (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC _)).

Definition ptdInitAlg : Ptd := ptd_from_alg InitAlg.

Section fix_a_Z.

  Context (Z : Ptd).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
isInitial [C, C] (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC)

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
F: [C, C]
iscontr ([C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC, F ⟧)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

[C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC, F ⟧
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
F: [C, C]
(λ cntr : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC, F ⟧,
 ∏ t : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC, F ⟧, t = cntr)
  ?pr1

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

nat_trans_data (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC) F
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
F: [C, C]
(λ t : nat_trans_data (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC) F,
 is_nat_trans (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC) F t) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
F: [C, C]
nat_trans_data (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC) F
 intros c; simpl; apply InitialArrow.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
F: [C, C]
(λ t : nat_trans_data (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC) F,
 is_nat_trans (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC) F t)
  ((λ c : C,
    InitialArrow IC (F c)
    :
    C ⟦ ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC c, F c ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC) F)
 abstract (intros x y f; cbn; apply InitialArrowEq).

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
F: [C, C]
(λ cntr : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC, F ⟧,
 ∏ t : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC, F ⟧, t = cntr)
  (((λ c : C,
     InitialArrow IC (F c)
     :
     C ⟦ ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC c, F c ⟧)
    :
    nat_trans_data (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC) F),,
   isInitial_pre_comp_subproof F)
 abstract (intros G; apply subtypePath;
    [ intros x; apply isaprop_is_nat_trans, homset_property
    | apply funextsec; intro c; apply InitialArrowUnique]).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
is_omega_cocont (ℓ (U Z))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
is_omega_cocont (ℓ (U Z))

apply is_omega_cocont_pre_composition_functor, CC.
Defined.

Definition SpecializedGMIt (X : EndC) :
  ∏ (G : functor [C, C] [C, C]) (ρ : [C, C] ⟦ G X, X ⟧)
    (θ : functor_composite Id_H (ℓ (U Z)) ⟹ functor_composite (ℓ (U Z)) G),
  ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) (alg_carrier _ InitAlg), X ⟧,
    # (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg) · h =
    θ (alg_carrier _ InitAlg) · # G h · ρ
  := SpecialGenMendlerIteration InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                                Id_H is_omega_cocont_Id_H X (ℓ (U Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU.

Context (prestrength_in_first_arg : PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint _ _ _ H Z).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
is_nat_trans (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z)))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
        (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (runitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
is_nat_trans (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z)))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
        (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (runitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) α
· BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
    (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
       (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
    (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
    (runitor_CAT (U Z))
    (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
  (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
     (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
  (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
  (runitor_CAT (U Z))
  (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
· # (pr1
       (CPEndEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
             (θ_source H) Z))) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (functor_identity C)
  (H X)
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H X'))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H X')))
  (# H α
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H X')))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (pr1 Z ∙ functor_identity C) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')
    (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X'))
    (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')))
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X'))
     · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')))
    c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (pr1 Z ∙ functor_identity C) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)))
  (nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X)
    (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          X'))
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z X')))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X
       X' α
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z X'))) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) ((pr1 Z ∙ H X') c))
  (identity (functor_identity C) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · runitor_CAT (pr1 Z) c)
  (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X')) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (pr1 Z ∙ functor_identity C) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)))
  (nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X)
    (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          X'))
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z X')))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X
       X' α
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z X'))) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c))
  (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
      · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c))) (identity (pr1 Z c))
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
      · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c))) (identity (pr1 Z c))
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · (identity (H X (Z c))
      · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c))) (identity (pr1 Z c))
  (pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z),
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) ⟧

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  nat_graph

  C C C H Z

CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) ⟧

  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
(λ t : nat_trans_data 
         (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
         (CPEndEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C] Ptd

   (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
   (CPEndEndC 
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg

  ?pr1

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

  C C C H Z
nat_trans_data (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X: [C, C]
[C, C] ⟦ (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) X,
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) X ⟧

  exact (BinCoproductOfArrows EndC (CPEndC _ _) (CPEndC _ _) (runitor_CAT (U Z))
           (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X⊗Z):functor C C))).

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
(λ t : nat_trans_data (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z)),
 is_nat_trans (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z)) t)
  ((λ X : [C, C],
    BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (U Z) (id1_CAT C))
         (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
      (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
      (runitor_CAT (U Z))
      (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))
   :
   nat_trans_data (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z)))
 exact aux_iso_1_is_nat_trans.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z))) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
        (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z))) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
        (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z))) α
· BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
    (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
       (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
    (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
    (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
    (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
     (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
  (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
  (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
  (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
· # (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        X'))
  (identity (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_source H) Z X')))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X X'
     α
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_source H) Z X'))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C ∙ pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')
    (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X'))
    (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')))
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X'))
     · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')))
    c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C ∙ pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))
  (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)))
  (nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (functor_identity C)
    (H X)
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H X'))
    (identity (functor_identity C)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H X')))
    (# H α
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H X')))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X
        c)) (CP (pr1 Z c) ((pr1 Z ∙ H X') c))
  (identity (pr1 Z) c · lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z) c)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X X'
     α c
   · nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X')) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C ∙ pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))
  (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)))
  (nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (functor_identity C)
    (H X)
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H X'))
    (identity (functor_identity C)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H X')))
    (# H α
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H X')))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c))
  (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X' (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c)) · # H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
  (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X' (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c))
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c)) · # H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
  (identity (H X (Z c)) · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X' (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c))
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c)) · # H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
  (pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X' (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)) (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

  (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C] Ptd 
           [C, C] 
           (θ_source H) Z)) 
         (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC 
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z)) 
   (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) t) 
  ?pr1

CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X: [C, C]
[C, C]
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) Z) X, (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) X ⟧

  exact (BinCoproductOfArrows EndC (CPEndC _ _) (CPEndC _ _) (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
         (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X⊗Z):functor C C))).

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) t)
  ((λ X : [C, C],
    BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (U Z))
         (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
      (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
      (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
      (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)))
 exact aux_iso_1_inv_is_nat_trans.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z)))
  (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   nat_trans_id
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z)) : C ⟶ C))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z)))
  (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   nat_trans_id
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z)) : C ⟶ C))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α
· nat_trans_id (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
nat_trans_id (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z)))
· # (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) α


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α =
# (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) α


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        X'))
  (identity (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X')))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X'))) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X))
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')))
  (identity (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X'))))
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')))) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X
        c))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          X') c)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          X') c) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X) c))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')) c)
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')) c)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X
        c))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP (pr1 Z c)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X' c)))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α c
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (pr1 Z c)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X' c))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X) c))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP (pr1 Z c)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X') c)))
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (pr1 Z c)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X') c)))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
  [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X' α c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# H
  (post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
   · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
· pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# (pr1 X) (identity (Z c)) · pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (X (Z c)) · pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

apply id_left.
Qed.

  C C C H Z
(λ t : nat_trans_data

           [C, C] Ptd

           (θ_target H) Z))

 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC 
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd

         (θ_target H) Z))
   (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) t) 
  ?pr1

HH: is_omega_cocont H

  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
X: [C, C]
[C, C]
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z) X,
(ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) X ⟧

  exact (nat_trans_id ((@BinCoproductObject EndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X⊗Z)) (CPEndC _ _) )
           : functor C C)).

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z))
         (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_target H) Z))
   (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) t)
  ((λ X : [C, C],
    nat_trans_id
      (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z)) : C ⟶ C))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))
     (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)))
 exact aux_iso_2_inv_is_nat_trans.
Defined.

Definition θ'_Thm15
  : EndEndC
    ⟦ BinCoproductObject
        (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) Z)),
      BinCoproductObject
        (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_target H) Z)) ⟧
  := BinCoproductOfArrows
   EndEndC (CPEndEndC _ _) (CPEndEndC _ _)
   (identity (constant_functor EndC _ (U Z): functor_category EndC EndC))
   prestrength_in_first_arg.

Definition ρ_Thm15 (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptdInitAlg ⟧)
  : [C, C] ⟦ BinCoproductObject (CPEndC (U Z) (H `InitAlg)), `InitAlg ⟧
  := @BinCoproductArrow
   EndC _ _  (CPEndC (U Z)
   (H (alg_carrier _ InitAlg))) (alg_carrier _ InitAlg) (#U f)
   (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC _ _) · (alg_map _ InitAlg)).


Definition SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧)
  : ∃! h : [C, C]
              ⟦ ℓ (U Z) (pr1 InitAlg),
              pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
       # (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg) · h =
       pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
         (pr1 InitAlg) ·
       # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h · ρ_Thm15 f :=
   (SpecializedGMIt (pr1 InitAlg) (Const_plus_H (U Z))
     (ρ_Thm15 f) (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)).

Definition bracket_Thm15 (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧)
  : [C, C]⟦ ℓ (U Z) (pr1 InitAlg), pr1 InitAlg ⟧
  := pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)).

Notation "⦃ f ⦄" := (bracket_Thm15 f) (at level 0).

(* we prove the individual components for ease of compilation *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
# U f = # (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄

CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

HH: is_omega_cocont H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
# U f = # (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄


C: category

  [C, C]

HH: is_omega_cocont H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

  C C C H Z
