C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h_eq: (λ h : [C, C] ⟦ 
       ℓ (U Z) (pr1 InitAlg), 
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 # (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg) · h =
 pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
   (pr1 InitAlg) · 
 # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h · 
 ρ_Thm15 f)
  (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
# U f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h_eq': (λ m : [C, C] ⟦ 
       (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg, 
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd 
       [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg · m)
  (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
   · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f))) =
(λ m : [C, C] ⟦ 
       (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg, 
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd 
       [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg · m)
  (pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
     (pr1 InitAlg)
   · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
       (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
   · ρ_Thm15 f)
# U f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h_eq1': (λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C] 
           (U Z) `InitAlg)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C] Ptd 
           [C, C] 
           (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] 
         [C, C] 
         (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg
   · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
      · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))) =
(λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C] 
           (U Z) `InitAlg)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C] Ptd 
           [C, C] 
           (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] 
         [C, C] 
         (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg
   · (pr1
        (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
        (pr1 InitAlg)
      · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
          (pr1
           (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
      · ρ_Thm15 f))
# U f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h_eq1'_inst: (BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] 
         [C, C] 
         (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] 
          [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg
    · (# (ℓ (U Z))
         (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
       · pr1
           (pr1
           (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))))
  c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] 
         [C, C] 
         (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] 
          [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15
          · aux_iso_2_inv) 
         (pr1 InitAlg)
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1
           (pr1
           (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 f))) c
# U f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
# U f c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv `InitAlg
    · (pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
         (pr1 InitAlg)
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 f))) c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv `InitAlg
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
       · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f))))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
# U f c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv `InitAlg
    · (pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
         (pr1 InitAlg)
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 f))) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z
     ∙ H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (prestrength_in_first_arg
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · identity
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z)
               (H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
       (# H
          (preIt InitialEndC
             Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
             is_omega_cocont_Id_H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
             (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                (ρ_Thm15 f)
                (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z)
               (H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
       c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
            is_omega_cocont_Id_H
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (prestrength_in_first_arg
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · (identity
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (pr1 Z
                  ∙ colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
              c)
         · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z)
                 (H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
              (identity (pr1 Z)
               · BinCoproductIn1
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (colim
                            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                               (initChain InitialEndC
                                  Id_H))))))
              (# H
                 (preIt InitialEndC
                    Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    Id_H is_omega_cocont_Id_H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                    (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
                    (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                       (colim
                          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                             (initChain InitialEndC
                                Id_H))) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                       (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                       (ρ_Thm15 f)
                       (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15
                        · aux_iso_2_inv)))
               · BinCoproductIn2
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (colim
                            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                               (initChain InitialEndC
                                  Id_H)))))) c
            · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                (pr1 f)
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                      (H
                         (colim
                            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                               (initChain InitialEndC
                                  Id_H)))))
                 · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                     is_omega_cocont_Id_H
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                c))))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z
     ∙ H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (identity
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (pr1 Z
               ∙ colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
           c)
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H))))))
           (# H
              (preIt InitialEndC
                 Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
                 is_omega_cocont_Id_H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
                 (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                    (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                    (ρ_Thm15 f)
                    (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15
                     · aux_iso_2_inv)))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H)))))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (pr1 f)
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H)))))
              · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                  is_omega_cocont_Id_H
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H
           (preIt InitialEndC
              Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
              is_omega_cocont_Id_H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
              (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 f)
                 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  now apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_in_ctx_dir,
            BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_in_ctx_dir,
            BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_dir.

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv `InitAlg
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
       · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f))))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z
     ∙ H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        is_omega_cocont_Id_H
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (identity
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))
           (λ a : C,
            make_ColimCocone
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) a)
              (ColimFunctor_ob
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) a0))
                 (pr1 Z a))
              (cocone_pointwise
                 (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))
                 (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
                 (mapcocone (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                    (colimCocone
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
                 a)
              (isColimFunctor_is_pointwise_Colim
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                 (λ b : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) b))
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                 (colimCocone
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                 (λ (F : C ⟶ C)
                  (cc : cocone
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                          F),
                  ColimFunctor_unique
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                    (λ a0 : C,
                     CC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                          a0)) F cc) (pr1 Z a))) c)
      · colimArrow
          (make_ColimCocone
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)
             (ColimFunctor_ob
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                (λ a : C,
                 CC
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) a))
                (pr1 Z c))
             (cocone_pointwise
                (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))
                (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
                (mapcocone (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                   (colimCocone
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
                c)
             (isColimFunctor_is_pointwise_Colim
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                (λ b : C,
                 CC
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) b))
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                (colimCocone
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                (λ (F : C ⟶ C)
                 (cc : cocone
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                         F),
                 ColimFunctor_unique
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                   (λ a : C,
                    CC
                      (diagram_pointwise
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                         a)) F cc) (pr1 Z c)))
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) a)) c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (GenMendlerIteration_alt.Pow_cocone
                InitialEndC Id_H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp
                (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                   (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                   (ρ_Thm15 f)
                   (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15
                    · aux_iso_2_inv))) c))) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C)
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC is_omega_cocont_Id_H
    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (identity
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))
        (λ a : C,
         make_ColimCocone
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) a)
           (ColimFunctor_ob
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
              (λ a0 : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) a0))
              (pr1 Z a))
           (cocone_pointwise
              (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
              (mapcocone (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                 (colimCocone
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
              a)
           (isColimFunctor_is_pointwise_Colim
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
              (λ b : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) b))
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
              (colimCocone
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
              (λ (F : C ⟶ C)
               (cc : cocone
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) F),
               ColimFunctor_unique
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) a0))
                 F cc) (pr1 Z a))) c)
   · colimArrow
       (make_ColimCocone
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) a))
             (pr1 Z c))
          (cocone_pointwise
             (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))
             (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
             (mapcocone (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                (colimCocone
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
             c)
          (isColimFunctor_is_pointwise_Colim
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
             (λ b : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) b))
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (colimCocone
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (λ (F : C ⟶ C)
              (cc : cocone
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) F),
              ColimFunctor_unique
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
                (λ a : C,
                 CC
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) a))
                F cc) (pr1 Z c)))
       (ColimFunctor_ob (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)
          (λ a : C,
           CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H) a)) c)
       (cocone_pointwise
          (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
          (GenMendlerIteration_alt.Pow_cocone
             InitialEndC Id_H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp
             (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                (ρ_Thm15 f)
                (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
          c))

  now rewrite id_left, assoc.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
· τ InitAlg = # (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
