  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
· τ InitAlg = # (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
 · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h_eq: (λ h : [C, C] ⟦ 
       ℓ (U Z) (pr1 InitAlg), 
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 # (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg) · h =
 pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
   (pr1 InitAlg) · 
 # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h · 
 ρ_Thm15 f)
  (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
 · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h_eq': (λ m : [C, C] ⟦ 
       (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg, 
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd 
       [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg · m)
  (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
   · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f))) =
(λ m : [C, C] ⟦ 
       (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg, 
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd 
       [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg · m)
  (pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
     (pr1 InitAlg)
   · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
       (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
   · ρ_Thm15 f)
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
 · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

(* until here same as in previous lemma *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h_eq2': (λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C] 
           (U Z) `InitAlg)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C] Ptd 
           [C, C] 
           (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] 
         [C, C] 
         (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg
   · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
      · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))) =
(λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C] 
           (U Z) `InitAlg)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C] Ptd 
           [C, C] 
           (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] 
         [C, C] 
         (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg
   · (pr1
        (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
        (pr1 InitAlg)
      · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
          (pr1
           (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
      · ρ_Thm15 f))
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
 · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h_eq2'_inst: (BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] 
         [C, C] 
         (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] 
          [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg
    · (# (ℓ (U Z))
         (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
       · pr1
           (pr1
           (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))))
  c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] 
         [C, C] 
         (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] 
          [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `InitAlg
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15
          · aux_iso_2_inv) 
         (pr1 InitAlg)
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1
           (pr1
           (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 f))) c
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
 · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
 · τ InitAlg) c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv `InitAlg
    · (pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
         (pr1 InitAlg)
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 f))) c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv `InitAlg
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
       · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f))))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
 · τ InitAlg) c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv `InitAlg
    · (pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
         (pr1 InitAlg)
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 f))) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c · # H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       is_omega_cocont_Id_H
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c) =
identity
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 Z c))
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z
     ∙ H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (prestrength_in_first_arg
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · identity
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z)
               (H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
       (# H
          (preIt InitialEndC
             Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
             is_omega_cocont_Id_H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
             (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                (ρ_Thm15 f)
                (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z)
               (H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
       c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
            is_omega_cocont_Id_H
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          is_omega_cocont_Id_H
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (prestrength_in_first_arg
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H))))))
           (# H
              (preIt InitialEndC
                 Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
                 is_omega_cocont_Id_H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
                 (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                    (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                    (ρ_Thm15 f)
                    (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15
                     · aux_iso_2_inv)))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H)))))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (pr1 f)
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H)))))
              · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                  is_omega_cocont_Id_H
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          is_omega_cocont_Id_H
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)) =
identity
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 Z c))
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z
     ∙ H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H
           (preIt InitialEndC
              Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
              is_omega_cocont_Id_H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
              (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 f)
                 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          is_omega_cocont_Id_H
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H
           (preIt InitialEndC
              Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
              is_omega_cocont_Id_H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
              (ψ_from_comps Id_H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 f)
                 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          is_omega_cocont_Id_H
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)) =
(prestrength_in_first_arg
   (colim
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (# H
        (preIt InitialEndC
           Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
           is_omega_cocont_Id_H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
           (ψ_from_comps Id_H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (ρ_Thm15 f)
              (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
            is_omega_cocont_Id_H
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          is_omega_cocont_Id_H
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)) =
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H
     (preIt InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        Id_H is_omega_cocont_Id_H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
        (ℓ (pr1 Z)) isInitial_pre_comp HU
        (ψ_from_comps Id_H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
           (ρ_Thm15 f)
           (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
         is_omega_cocont_Id_H
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
            (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       is_omega_cocont_Id_H
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c) =
(# H
   (preIt InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
      Id_H is_omega_cocont_Id_H
      (colim
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
            (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
      isInitial_pre_comp HU
      (ψ_from_comps Id_H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
         (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
         (ρ_Thm15 f)
         (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
         is_omega_cocont_Id_H
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
            (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
# H
  (preIt InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     Id_H is_omega_cocont_Id_H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
     isInitial_pre_comp HU
     (ψ_from_comps Id_H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
        (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 f)
        (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
         is_omega_cocont_Id_H
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
            (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c =
# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       is_omega_cocont_Id_H
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
         is_omega_cocont_Id_H
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
            (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C)
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC is_omega_cocont_Id_H
    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c

  now apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `InitAlg)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv `InitAlg
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
       · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f))))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
c: C
(nat_trans_id (θ_source H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z)))) c
· (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
   · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 f))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  now rewrite id_left; apply assoc.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
bracket_property_parts prestrength_in_first_arg
  InitAlg f ⦃ f ⦄

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

HH: is_omega_cocont H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H

  C C C H Z

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
· τ InitAlg = 
τ InitAlg •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
# U f = η InitAlg •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄
 exact (bracket_Thm15_ok_part1 f).

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄
· τ InitAlg = τ InitAlg •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄
 exact (bracket_Thm15_ok_part2 f).
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
bracket_property prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f
  ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
bracket_property prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f
  ⦃ f ⦄

now apply whole_from_parts, bracket_Thm15_ok.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
∏
t : ∑ h : [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
    bracket_property prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg
      f h, t = ⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor f


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
