  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
∏
t : ∑ h : [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
    bracket_property prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg
      f h, t = ⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor f


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property prestrength_in_first_arg
  InitAlg f h'
pr1 (h',, h'_eq) =
pr1 (⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor f)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f h'
h' = ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f h'
c: C
(# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H InitAlg) · h') c =
(pr1 (aux_iso_1 · θ'_Thm15 · aux_iso_2_inv)
   (pr1 InitAlg) · # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h'
 · ρ_Thm15 f) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1
  (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC is_omega_cocont_Id_H
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h' c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (pr1 Z
           ∙ H
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1
  (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC is_omega_cocont_Id_H
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h' c =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z
       ∙ H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1
        (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
           (pr1 Z
            ∙ H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (prestrength_in_first_arg
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z)
                 (H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
           (# H h'
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H)))))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (pr1 f)
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H)))))
              · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                  is_omega_cocont_Id_H
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c)))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (prestrength_in_first_arg
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z)
                 (H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
           (# H h'
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H)))))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
             (pr1 f)
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               Id_H)))))
              · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                  is_omega_cocont_Id_H
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c)))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z
       ∙ H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        is_omega_cocont_Id_H
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z
       ∙ H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        is_omega_cocont_Id_H
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
   h' c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
     (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
        [C, C, C] 
        (precategory_Ptd C) 
        [C, C, C] 
        (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C, C] 
           (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] 
           (θ_target H) Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C, C] 
           (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] 
           (θ_target H) Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data 
          [C, C] 
          [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C] 
           (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C, C] 
           (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] 
           (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
        (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose 
           (pr1 Z)
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP 
           (pr1 Z)
           (H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 Z)
           (H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 Z)
           (H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
          (pr1 Z)
          (H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) 
          (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC 
           (functor_identity C)
           (H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · 
           colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
           is_omega_cocont_Id_H
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z
       ∙ H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        is_omega_cocont_Id_H
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq1: # U f = η InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        is_omega_cocont_Id_H
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z
     ∙ H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq1: # U f = η InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       is_omega_cocont_Id_H
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq1: # U f = η InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
# U f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  now apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_in_ctx_dir,
            BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_in_ctx_dir,
            BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_dir.

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  prestrength_in_first_arg InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z
       ∙ H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        is_omega_cocont_Id_H
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq2: prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
· τ InitAlg = 
τ InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z
       ∙ H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        is_omega_cocont_Id_H
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq2: prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
· τ InitAlg = 
τ InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z
       ∙ H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       is_omega_cocont_Id_H
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq2: prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
· τ InitAlg = 
τ InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
 · τ InitAlg) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (prestrength_in_first_arg
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        (# H h'
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
        c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq2: prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
· τ InitAlg = 
τ InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
 · τ InitAlg) c =
(prestrength_in_first_arg
   (colim
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (# H h'
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
            is_omega_cocont_Id_H
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq2: prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
· τ InitAlg = 
τ InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
(prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
 · τ InitAlg) c =
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H h'
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
         is_omega_cocont_Id_H
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
            (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: precategory
Z: Ptd
prestrength_in_first_arg: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint
  C C C H Z
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq2: prestrength_in_first_arg `InitAlg · # H h'
· τ InitAlg = 
τ InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H h' c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          is_omega_cocont_Id_H
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)) c)) =
prestrength_in_first_arg
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (# H h' c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 f)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
               is_omega_cocont_Id_H
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c))

  now apply maponpaths, maponpaths, pathsinv0, BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
Qed.

End fix_a_Z.

End fix_an_H.

Context (H :  @Presignature C C C) (HH : is_omega_cocont H).
Let Id_H := Id_H C CP H.
Let θ := theta H.
Let InitAlg := InitAlg H HH.
Let ptdInitAlg := ptdInitAlg H HH.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
bracket θ InitAlg


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
bracket θ InitAlg


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
bracket_at C CP H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
∑
h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑
          h : 
           [C, C, C] ⟦ 
           U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧,
          bracket_property
           (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C] Ptd 
           [C, C] 
           (θ_source H) 
           (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     h : [C, C, C] ⟦ 
         U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧,
     bracket_property
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h, 
 t = cntr) ?pr1

bracket_property

     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
