ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
(λ h : [C, C, C] ⟦ 
       U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧,
 bracket_property
   (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
      [C, C] Ptd 
      [C, C] 
      (θ_source H) 
      (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
[C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧
 exact (bracket_Thm15 H HH Z (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ Z) f).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
(λ h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C],
       `InitAlg ⟧,
 bracket_property
   (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
      (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h)
  (bracket_Thm15 H HH Z
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) f)
 exact (bracket_Thm15_ok_cor H HH Z (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ Z) f).
    (* B: better to prove the whole outside, and apply it here *)
    (* when the first components were not opaque, the following proof
       became extremely slow *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑
          h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C],
              `InitAlg ⟧,
          bracket_property
            (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg
            f h,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C],
         `InitAlg ⟧,
     bracket_property
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h,
 t = cntr)
  (bracket_Thm15 H HH Z
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) f,,
   bracket_Thm15_ok_cor H HH Z
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) f)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitAlg ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    h : functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
          (ColimFunctor_data
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)))
        ⟹ ColimFunctor_data
            (initChain InitialEndC
               (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
            (λ a : C,
             CC
               (diagram_pointwise
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                  a)),
    bracket_property
      (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z)
      (ColimFunctor
         (initChain InitialEndC
            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
         (λ a : C,
          CC
            (diagram_pointwise
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a)),,
       colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
            (initChain InitialEndC
               (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) f
      h,
t =
nat_trans_comp
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
        (ColimFunctor_data
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a))))
     (ColimFunctor_data
        (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
        (λ a : C,
         make_ColimCocone
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
              a)
           (ColimFunctor_ob
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a0 : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a0)) (pr1 Z a))
           (cocone_pointwise
              (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (ColimFunctor
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))
                    (λ a0 : C,
                     CC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H)) a0))))
              (mapcocone (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (make_cocone
                    (colim_nat_trans_in_data
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))
                       (λ a0 : C,
                        CC
                          (diagram_pointwise
                             (initChain InitialEndC
                                (...)) a0)))
                    (ColimFunctorCocone_subproof
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))
                       (λ a0 : C,
                        CC
                          (diagram_pointwise
                             (initChain InitialEndC
                                (...)) a0))))) a)
           (isColimFunctor_is_pointwise_Colim
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ b : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) b))
              (ColimFunctor
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a0)))
              (make_cocone
                 (colim_nat_trans_in_data
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))
                    (λ a0 : C,
                     CC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H)) a0)))
                 (ColimFunctorCocone_subproof
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))
                    (λ a0 : C,
                     CC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H)) a0))))
              (λ (F : C ⟶ C)
               (cc : cocone
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) F),
               ColimFunctor_unique
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a0)) F cc)
              (pr1 Z a))))
     (λ a : C,
      identity
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a0 : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a0)) (pr1 Z a)))
     (pointwise_Colim_is_isColimFunctor_subproof C C
        nat_graph
        (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (ColimFunctor
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a))))
        (mapcocone (ℓ (pr1 Z))
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (make_cocone
              (colim_nat_trans_in_data
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a)))
              (ColimFunctorCocone_subproof
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a)))))
        (λ a : C,
         isColimFunctor_is_pointwise_Colim
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ b : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 b))
           (ColimFunctor
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a0 : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a0)))
           (make_cocone
              (colim_nat_trans_in_data
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a0)))
              (ColimFunctorCocone_subproof
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a0))))
           (λ (F : C ⟶ C)
            (cc : cocone
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) F),
            ColimFunctor_unique
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a0 : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a0)) F cc) (pr1 Z a))))
  ((λ a : C,
    colimArrow
      (CC
         (diagram_pointwise
            (initChain InitialEndC
               (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
            (pr1 Z a)))
      (ColimFunctor_ob
         (initChain InitialEndC
            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
         (λ b : C,
          CC
            (diagram_pointwise
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) b))
         (pr1 Z a))
      (cocone_pointwise
         (initChain InitialEndC
            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
         (ColimFunctor
            (initChain InitialEndC
               (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
            (λ b : C,
             CC
               (diagram_pointwise
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                  b)))
         (make_cocone
            (colim_nat_trans_in_data
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
               (λ b : C,
                CC
                  (diagram_pointwise
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)) b)))
            (ColimFunctorCocone_subproof
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
               (λ b : C,
                CC
                  (diagram_pointwise
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)) b)))) (pr1 Z a))
    · colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 Z a)))
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a0 : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a0)) a)
        (cocone_pointwise
           (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
           (ColimFunctor
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a0 : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a0)))
           (GenMendlerIteration_alt.Pow_cocone
              InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
              (ColimFunctor
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a0))) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (isInitial_pre_comp Z)
              (ψ_from_comps
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
                 (ColimFunctor
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))
                    (λ a0 : C,
                     CC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H)) a0)))
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H C CP H (pr1 Z))
                 (coproduct_nat_trans C C CP (pr1 Z)
                    (H
                       (ColimFunctor
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H))
                          (λ a0 : C,
                           CC
                             (diagram_pointwise ... a0))))
                    (ColimFunctor
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))
                       (λ a0 : C,
                        CC
                          (diagram_pointwise
                             (initChain InitialEndC
                                ...) a0))) (pr1 f)
                    (nat_trans_comp
                       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 C C CP
                          (functor_identity C)
                          (H
                             (ColimFunctor (...) (...))))
                       (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                          (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
                          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                             (initChain InitialEndC
                                (...))))))
                 (nat_trans_comp
                    (nat_trans_comp (aux_iso_1 H Z)
                       (coproduct_nat_trans [C, C]
                          [C, C] CPEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z)
                          (BinCoproduct_of_functors
                             [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
                             (constant_functor
                                [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                (...))
                             (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                [C, C, C] (...)
                                [C, C, C] (...) Z))
                          (nat_trans_comp
                             (nat_trans_id (...))
                             (coproduct_nat_trans_in1
                                [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
                                (...) (...)))
                          (nat_trans_comp
                             (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg
                                [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
                                (...) (...) θ Z)
                             (coproduct_nat_trans_in2
                                [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
                                (...) (...)))))
                    (aux_iso_2_inv H Z)))) a)),,
   ColimFunctor_unique_subproof
     (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (λ a : C,
      make_ColimCocone
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) a)
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a0 : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a0)) (pr1 Z a))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (mapdiagram (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (ColimFunctor
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a0))))
           (mapcocone (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (make_cocone
                 (colim_nat_trans_in_data
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))
                    (λ a0 : C,
                     CC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H)) a0)))
                 (ColimFunctorCocone_subproof
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))
                    (λ a0 : C,
                     CC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H)) a0))))) a)
        (isColimFunctor_is_pointwise_Colim
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ b : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 b))
           (ColimFunctor
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a0 : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a0)))
           (make_cocone
              (colim_nat_trans_in_data
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a0)))
              (ColimFunctorCocone_subproof
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a0 : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a0))))
           (λ (F : C ⟶ C)
            (cc : cocone
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) F),
            ColimFunctor_unique
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a0 : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a0)) F cc) (pr1 Z a)))
     (ColimFunctor
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a)))
     (GenMendlerIteration_alt.Pow_cocone InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
        (ColimFunctor
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a))) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
        (isInitial_pre_comp Z)
        (ψ_from_comps
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
           (ColimFunctor
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a))) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
           (Const_plus_H C CP H (pr1 Z))
           (coproduct_nat_trans C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (ColimFunctor
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))
                    (λ a : C,
                     CC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H)) a))))
              (ColimFunctor
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 (λ a : C,
                  CC
                    (diagram_pointwise
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)) a))) (pr1 f)
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 C C CP
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (H
                       (ColimFunctor
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H))
                          (λ a : C,
                           CC
                             (diagram_pointwise (...)
                                a)))))
                 (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                    (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (nat_trans_comp (aux_iso_1 H Z)
                 (coproduct_nat_trans [C, C] [C, C]
                    CPEndC
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_source H) Z)
                    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C]
                       [C, C] CPEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                    (nat_trans_comp
                       (nat_trans_id
                          (constant_functor_data
                             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                             (pr1 Z)))
                       (coproduct_nat_trans_in1 [C, C]
                          [C, C] CPEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                    (nat_trans_comp
                       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C]
                          Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
                          (θ_target H) θ Z)
                       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2 [C, C]
                          [C, C] CPEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))))
              (aux_iso_2_inv H Z))))),,
bracket_Thm15_ok_cor H HH Z
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) f
 apply bracket_unique.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
hss_category CP H


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
hss_category CP H

 (*
  red. (* FORBIDDEN, otherwise universe problem when checking the definition *)
  unfold hss_precategory; simpl.
*)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
bracket (theta H) InitAlg

exact bracket_for_InitAlg.
Defined.

Local Definition Ghat : EndEndC := Const_plus_H C CP H (pr1 InitAlg).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
C', D: category
d, d': D
m: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
[C', D] ⟦ constant_functor C' D d,
constant_functor C' D d' ⟧

CP: BinCoproducts C

CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

d, d': D

[C', D] ⟦ constant_functor C' D d,

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
C', D: category
d, d': D
m: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
is_nat_trans (constant_functor C' D d)
  (constant_functor C' D d') (λ _ : C', m)

abstract (intros ? ? ?; intermediate_path m; [ apply id_left | apply pathsinv0, id_right]).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptdInitAlg ⟧
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) Z),
CPEndEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_target H)
     Z) ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptdInitAlg ⟧
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) Z),
CPEndEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_target H)
     Z) ⟧

exact (BinCoproductOfArrows EndEndC (CPEndEndC _ _) (CPEndEndC _ _)
                           (constant_nat_trans _ _ _ _ (#U f))
                           (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ Z)).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z),
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z),
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) ⟧

exact (aux_iso_1 H Z).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat)
  (λ X : [C, C],
   nat_trans_id
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           X) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z))
      :
      C ⟶ C))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat)
  (λ X : [C, C],
   nat_trans_id
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           X) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z))
      :
      C ⟶ C))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α
· nat_trans_id
    (CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
          X') (θ_target H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
nat_trans_id
  (CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) X)
     (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z))) · # (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) α


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α = # (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) α


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X)
  (CPEndC
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        X'))
  (identity
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X')))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X'))) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X))
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')))
  (identity
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X'))))
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')))) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a))
        c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X
        c))
  (identity
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a))
        c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          X') c)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          X') c) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a))
        c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X) c))
  (identity
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a))
        c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')) c)
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')) c)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a))
        c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X
        c))
  (identity
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a))
        c)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)) c)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X' c)))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α c
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)) c)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X' c))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a))
        c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X) c))
  (identity
     (ColimFunctor_ob
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        (λ a : C,
         CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a))
        c)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)) c)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X') c)))
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)) c)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X') c)))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
  [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X' α c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# H
  (post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
   · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
· pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# (pr1 X) (identity (Z c)) · pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (X (Z c)) · pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat ⟧

nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C] 
           (pr1 InitAlg))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C] Ptd 
           [C, C] 
           (θ_target H) Z)) 
         (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd 
         [C, C] 
         (θ_target H) Z)) 
   (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) t) 
  ?pr1

  nat_graph

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
[C, C]
⟦ CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z) X, (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) X ⟧

  exact (nat_trans_id ((@BinCoproductObject EndC _ (θ_target H (X⊗Z)) (CPEndC _ _) )
            : functor C C)).

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) t)
  ((λ X : [C, C],
    nat_trans_id
      (CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
            X) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z))
       :
       C ⟶ C))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat))
 exact (is_nat_trans_iso2' Z).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptdInitAlg ⟧
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptdInitAlg ⟧
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat ⟧

exact (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z).
Defined.


Local Notation "C '^op'" := (opp_precat C) (format "C ^op").

Let Yon (X : EndC) : functor EndC^op HSET := yoneda_objects EndC X.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
  (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X),
 is_nat_trans
   (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
   (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) t) 
  ?pr1


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
  (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
Y: [C, C]^op
a: Sets.pr1hSet
  ((functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)) Y)
Sets.pr1hSet ((functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) Y)

  exact (a · b).

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X),
 is_nat_trans
   (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
   (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) t)
  ((λ Y : [C, C]^op,
    (λ a : Sets.pr1hSet
             ((functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
               ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)) Y), a · b)
    :
    SET
    ⟦ (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)) Y,
    (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) Y ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
     (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X))
 abstract (intros ? ? ?; simpl; apply funextsec; intro;
            unfold yoneda_objects_ob; simpl; unfold compose; simpl;
            apply nat_trans_eq; [apply homset_property |]; simpl; intro;
            apply assoc').
Defined.

Let IA := colimAlgInitial InitialEndC (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC _).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
ishssMor C CP H
  (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')
   :
   algebra_mor Id_H InitAlg T')


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
ishssMor C CP H
  (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')
   :
   algebra_mor Id_H InitAlg T')


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
fbracket InitHSS f · InitialArrow IA (pr1 T') =
InitialArrow IA (pr1 T') •• U Z
· fbracket T'
    (f
     · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H)
         (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
fbracket InitHSS f · β0 =
β0 •• U Z
· fbracket T' (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
