  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
fbracket InitHSS f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
fbracket InitHSS f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
fbracket InitHSS f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))

Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧

  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
pr1 (pr1 X) =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z): ∏ (IL' : isInitial [C, C] (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) IL' 
    (HU Z) ψ'
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z): ∏ (IL' : isInitial [C, C] (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) IL' 
    (HU Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z): ∏ (IL' : isInitial [C, C] (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) IL' 
    (HU Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Psi'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) 
    (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
    (HU Z) Psi'
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z): ∏ (IL' : isInitial [C, C] (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) IL' 
    (HU Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Psi'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) 
    (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
    (HU Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z): ∏ (IL' : isInitial [C, C] (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) IL' 
    (HU Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Psi'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) 
    (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
    (HU Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Psi'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) 
    (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
    (HU Z) Psi'
fbracket InitHSS f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law InitialEndC
  Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
  (pr1 InitAlg) `T': ∏ (L : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL : is_omega_cocont L)
(IL : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC))
(ψ : ψ_source (pr1 InitAlg) L
     ⟹ ψ_target Id_H (pr1 InitAlg) L)
(L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]) 
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp L
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) L IL HL ψ) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(HL' : is_omega_cocont L')
(IL' : isInitial [C, C] (L' InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' L' ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T' L' IL'
    HL' ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (HU Z): ∏ (IL' : isInitial [C, C] (ℓ (U Z) InitialEndC))
(ψ' : ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· ψ'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) IL' 
    (HU Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 (isInitial_pre_comp Z) Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Psi'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) 
    (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
    (HU Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Psi'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
→ Φ
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
    (It InitialEndC
       Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) 
       (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
       (HU Z) Psi) =
  It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
    Id_H (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) `T'
    (ℓ (U Z)) 
    (isInitial_pre_comp Z) 
    (HU Z) Psi'
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS f) = pr1 (pr1 X)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS f) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
  (It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) (pr1 InitAlg)
     (ℓ (U Z)) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) (HU Z) Psi)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Psi'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS f) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
  (It InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH) (pr1 InitAlg)
     (ℓ (U Z)) (isInitial_pre_comp Z) (HU Z) Psi)
 now apply cancel_postcomposition.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
Psi
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Φ
    (Id_H
       `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
           (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) =
Φ
  `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
      (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
· Psi'
    `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
(Psi
   `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
 · Φ
     (Id_H
        `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
            (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
