CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
(identity (pr1 Z)
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))))
     (# H t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H))))))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 f)
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
         · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
             (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        c
      · colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))) =
(pr1 f
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (t · β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))))
     (# H t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H))))))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 f)
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
         · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
             (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        c
      · colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))) =
pr1 f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (t · β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
(identity (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))))
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 f)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) c
   · colimArrow
       (CC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
       (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
       (cocone_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          `(pr1 T')
          (make_cocone
             (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                (pr1 T'))
             (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c)) =
pr1 f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (t · β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 f)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) c
   · colimArrow
       (CC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
       (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
       (cocone_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          `(pr1 T')
          (make_cocone
             (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                (pr1 T'))
             (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c)) =
pr1 f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (t · β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
pr1 f c
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c) =
pr1 f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (t · β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
pr1 f c
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c) =
pr1 f c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (t · β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
colimArrow
  (CC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
  (cocone_pointwise
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
     (make_cocone
        (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
        (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c) =
(identity
   (colim
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC
            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
colimArrow
  (CC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
  (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
  (cocone_pointwise
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
     (make_cocone
        (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
        (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  (H `(pr1 T')) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

      now apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes_right_dir.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z)
               (H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H)))))))
       (# H t
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z)
               (H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H))))))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (pr1 f)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H))))))
        · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
            (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       c
   · colimArrow
       (CC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
       (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
       (cocone_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          `(pr1 T')
          (make_cocone
             (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                (pr1 T'))
             (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (pr1 f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H (t · β)
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                  C CP H)))))))
           (# H t
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (colim
                         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                            (initChain InitialEndC
                               (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                  C CP H))))))) c
         · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))))
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))) (pr1 f)
              (BinCoproductIn2
                 (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                    (H
                       (colim
                          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                             (initChain InitialEndC
                                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                   C CP H))))))
               · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                   (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) c
            · colimArrow
                (CC
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)) c))
                (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
                (cocone_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   `(pr1 T')
                   (make_cocone
                      (Adamek.cocone_over_alg
                         InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
                      (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC
                         (pr1 T'))) c))))) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (pr1 f
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))
           (identity
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))
                   (H `(pr1 T'))))
           (# H (t · β)
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))
                   (H `(pr1 T')))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
(nat_trans_id
   (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
      (H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H)))))))
        (# H t
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))))
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (pr1 f)
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H))))))
            · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           c
         · colimArrow
             (CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
             (cocone_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                `(pr1 T')
                (make_cocone
                   (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))
                   (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))) c)))) =
(nat_trans_id
   (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
      (H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (pr1 f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (t · β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
