             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H)))))))
        (# H t
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))))
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (pr1 f)
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H))))))
            · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           c
         · colimArrow
             (CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
             (cocone_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                `(pr1 T')
                (make_cocone
                   (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))
                   (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))) c)))) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (pr1 f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (t · β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
   (colim
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))))
     (# H t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H))))))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 f)
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
         · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
             (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        c
      · colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))) =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
   (colim
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (t · β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H)))))))
        (# H t
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))))
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (pr1 f)
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H
                    (colim
                       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                          (initChain InitialEndC
                             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                                C CP H))))))
            · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
                (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           c
         · colimArrow
             (CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
             (cocone_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                `(pr1 T')
                (make_cocone
                   (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))
                   (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))) c)))) =
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC Id_H)))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (t · β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
(# H t
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))))
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 f)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) c
   · colimArrow
       (CC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
       (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
       (cocone_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          `(pr1 T')
          (make_cocone
             (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                (pr1 T'))
             (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c)) =
(# H (t · β)
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
# H t c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
    c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 f)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
          (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) c
   · colimArrow
       (CC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
       (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
       (cocone_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          `(pr1 T')
          (make_cocone
             (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                (pr1 T'))
             (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c)) =
# H (t · β) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (H `(pr1 T')) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
# H t c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 f)
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
         · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
             (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        c
      · colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))) =
# H (t · β) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
# H t c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 f)
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
         · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
             (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        c
      · colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))) =
(# H t · # H β) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
# H t c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 f)
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
              (H
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
         · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
             (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        c
      · colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))) =
# H t c
· (# H β c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
      (H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
 · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) c
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c) =
# H β c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
Hyp_c: (# H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) · τ (pr1 T'))
  c = (τ IA · InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) c
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
      (H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
 · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) c
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c) =
# H β c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
Hyp_c: # H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] 
          [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C] 
           (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T') c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C)
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
  c
· colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
    (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
    c
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          c)) 
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
       `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
           (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC
           (pr1 T'))) c)
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
      (H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
 · colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) c
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c) =
# H β c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
Psi:= ψ_from_comps Id_H
  `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
  (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H C CP H (U Z)) 
  (ρ_Thm15 H HH Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 H Z
   · θ'_Thm15 H Z
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z) · 
   aux_iso_2_inv H Z): ψ_source `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
  (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `
    (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH) 
    (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps Id_H `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target Id_H `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source 
     (pr1 InitAlg) 
     (ℓ (U Z))
     `(colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
         (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
         (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC Id_H))))
c: C
Hyp_c: # H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] 
          [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C] 
           (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T') c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C)
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
  c
· colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
    (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
    c
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          c)) 
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
       `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
           (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC
           (pr1 T'))) c)
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c) =
# H β c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      now apply maponpaths, pathsinv0, BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
pr1 (pr1 X) =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH))
· (β •• U Z
   · fbracket T'
       (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)) =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat
    (β •• U Z
     · fbracket T'
         (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))
· rhohat

    (* now a lot of serious verification work to be done *)
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
(# (ℓ (U Z))
   (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
      (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH))
 · (β •• U Z
    · fbracket T'
        (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))) c =
(thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
 · # Ghat
     (β •• U Z
      · fbracket T'
          (f · # (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))
 · rhohat) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
pr1
  (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (colimArrow
     (CC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
     (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (cocone_pointwise
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
        `(pr1 T')
        (make_cocone
           (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
              (pr1 T'))
           (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
        (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
   · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (pr1 Z
           ∙ H
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (pr1 Z
           ∙ H
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H))))))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
    (pr1 f
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z)
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z)
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
    c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (H
       (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')))
    (identity
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
            (H `(pr1 T'))))
    (# H
       (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
        · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
            (H `(pr1 T')))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

    (* look at type: *)
    (*  match goal with | [ |- ?l = _ ] => let ty:= (type of l) in idtac ty end. *)
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H)))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H))))))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (pr1 f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
