               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H
          (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · fbracket T'
               (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `
           (pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
           (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
           (pr1 T'))
           (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (CPEndC 
        (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC 
           (pr1 Z)
           (pr1 Z
           ∙ 
           H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 Z)
           (H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC 
           (pr1 Z)
           (pr1 Z
           ∙ 
           H
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
          [C, C, C] 
          (precategory_Ptd C) 
          [C, C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
          [C, C] 
          [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C]
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C, C] 
           (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] 
           (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (pr1 f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C]
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C, C] 
           (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] 
           (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
          [C, C] Ptd 
          [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) 
          (θ_target H) θ Z
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C]
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C, C] 
           (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] 
           (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H
          (functor_compose 
           (pr1 Z)
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity
          (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H
          (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · 
           fbracket T'
           (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
        · BinCoproductIn2
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `
       (pr1 T') β 
       (τ (pr1 T')) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H)))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H))))))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (pr1 f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H
          (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · fbracket T'
               (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H)))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H))))))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (pr1 f
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))
           (identity
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))
                   (H `(pr1 T'))))
           (# H
              (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
               · fbracket T'
                   (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))
                   (H `(pr1 T')))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))))
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (pr1 f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T'
                (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z
   ∙ H
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (pr1 f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T'
                (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
(pr1 f
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T'
             (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
pr1 f c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T'
                (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
pr1 f c · β c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c =
pr1 f c · β c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
fbracket_η_inst_c: # U
  (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)
  c =
(η T' •• U Z
 · fbracket T'
     (f
      · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
  c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c =
pr1 f c · β c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
fbracket_η_inst_c: # U
  (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)
  c =
(η T' •• U Z
 · fbracket T'
     (f
      · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
  c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c =
(η T' •• U Z
 · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c

      apply cancel_postcomposition, (ptd_mor_commutes _ (ptd_from_alg_mor _ CP H β0) ((pr1 Z) c)).
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H)))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H))))))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (pr1 f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
       c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H
          (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · fbracket T'
               (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (colim
                  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                     (initChain InitialEndC
                        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                           H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z
      ∙ H
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H)))))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (pr1 Z
              ∙ H
                  (colim
                     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                        (initChain InitialEndC
                           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                              CP H))))))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z)
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (pr1 f
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z)
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))
           (identity
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))
                   (H `(pr1 T'))))
           (# H
              (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
               · fbracket T'
                   (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (colim
                      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                         (initChain InitialEndC
                            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H
                               C CP H))))
                   (H `(pr1 T')))) c
