         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
(nat_trans_id
   (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
      (H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))))
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (pr1 f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T'
                (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
identity
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 Z c))
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z
     ∙ H
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
    c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z)
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (pr1 f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z)
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
     c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T'
                (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
identity
  (H
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 Z c))
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (pr1 Z c)
       ((pr1 Z
         ∙ H
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
          c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           c))
     ((pr1 f
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))) c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
              c)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))) c))
        ((identity
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          · BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
           c)
        ((# H
            (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
             · fbracket T'
                 (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
           c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
                c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (τ (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     ((pr1 Z
       ∙ H
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           c))
     ((pr1 f
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))) c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))))) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
              c)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))) c))
        ((identity
            (colim
               (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                  (initChain InitialEndC
                     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          · BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
           c)
        ((# H
            (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
             · fbracket T'
                 (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H)))) (H `(pr1 T'))))
           c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
                c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (τ (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
   (colim
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC
            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))))
  c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))) c))
     ((identity
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
     ((# H
         (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
          · fbracket T'
              (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
             c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c) (τ (pr1 T') c))

CP: BinCoproducts C

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧

  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
(θ
   (colim
      (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
         (initChain InitialEndC
            (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z)
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))))
  c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))) c))
     ((identity
         (colim
            (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
               (initChain InitialEndC
                  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)))) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
     ((# H
         (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
          · fbracket T'

       · BinCoproductIn2

              (colim

                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
             c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c) (τ (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (colim
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))))
    c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a)) c)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))) c))
     (identity
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a)) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) c)
     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T'
             (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)) c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
       (colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a)) c)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))) c))
     (identity
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a)) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) c)
     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T'
             (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
                c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)) c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
       (colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           c))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP
           (ColimFunctor_ob
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a)) c)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))) c))
        (identity
           (ColimFunctor_ob
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a)) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T'
                (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H))) c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP
             (ColimFunctor_ob
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                (λ a : C,
                 CC
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)) a)) c)
             (H `(pr1 T') c))
          (colimArrow
             (CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
             (cocone_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                `(pr1 T')
                (make_cocone
                   (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))
                   (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))) c))
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (functor_identity C c)
                (H `(pr1 T') c))
           · alg_map
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H)
               (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
           [C, C, C] 
           (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] 
           (θ_target H) Z
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))) c))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP
           (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ 
           a : C,
           CC
           (diagram_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a)) c)
           (H
           (functor_compose 
           (pr1 Z)
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))) c))
        (identity
           (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ 
           a : C,
           CC
           (diagram_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a)) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · 
           fbracket T'
           (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
         · BinCoproductIn2
           (CP
           (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
           (H `(pr1 T') c)))
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP
           (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ 
           a : C,
           CC
           (diagram_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a)) c)
           (H `(pr1 T') c))
          (colimArrow
           (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
           (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
           (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
           (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
           (pr1 T'))
           (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c))
          (BinCoproductIn2
           (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
           · 
           alg_map
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C] 
           (functor_identity C)) H) 
           (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z
           (colim
              (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
           c))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP
           (ColimFunctor_ob
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a)) c)
           (H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (colim
                    (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                       (initChain InitialEndC
                          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                             CP H))))) c))
        (identity
           (ColimFunctor_ob
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (λ a : C,
               CC
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H)) a)) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
             (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T'
                (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CP
                (colim
                   (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H))) c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP
             (ColimFunctor_ob
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                (λ a : C,
                 CC
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (initChain InitialEndC
                         (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
                            CP H)) a)) c)
             (H `(pr1 T') c))
          (colimArrow
             (CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
             (cocone_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                `(pr1 T')
                (make_cocone
                   (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))
                   (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC
                      (pr1 T'))) c))
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (functor_identity C c)
                (H `(pr1 T') c))
           · alg_map
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H)
               (pr1 T') c)))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a)) c)
        (H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (colim
                 (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                    (initChain InitialEndC
                       (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP
                          H))))) c))
     (identity
        (ColimFunctor_ob
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           (λ a : C,
            CC
              (diagram_pointwise
                 (initChain InitialEndC
                    (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                 a)) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (colim
             (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
          (H `(pr1 T')) c)
     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T'
             (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (colim
                (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
                c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)) c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
       (colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

           
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
# H
  (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
   · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (colim
          (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
       (H `(pr1 T') c))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (ColimFunctor_ob
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (λ a : C,
           CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                a)) c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
    (colimArrow
       (CC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
       (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
       (cocone_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          `(pr1 T')
          (make_cocone
             (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                (pr1 T'))
             (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c)

  nat_graph

     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
# H
  (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
   · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
        (H `(pr1 T') c))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (ColimFunctor_ob
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             (λ a : C,
              CC
                (diagram_pointwise
                   (initChain InitialEndC
                      (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                   a)) c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
       (colimArrow
          (CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                c)) (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
          (cocone_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
             `(pr1 T')
             (make_cocone
                (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                   (pr1 T'))
                (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
             c))
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
