  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) c)
     (H `(pr1 T') c))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (ColimFunctor_ob
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (λ a : C,
           CC
             (diagram_pointwise
                (initChain InitialEndC
                   (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
                a)) c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
    (colimArrow
       (CC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (initChain InitialEndC
                (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) c))
       (pr1 `(pr1 T') c)
       (cocone_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          `(pr1 T')
          (make_cocone
             (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                (pr1 T'))
             (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))) c))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c)

           
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c

           apply idpath.
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1
     (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
        (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
     (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (colimArrow
        (CC
           (diagram_pointwise
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
              (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
        (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
        (cocone_pointwise
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
           `(pr1 T')
           (make_cocone
              (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC
                 (pr1 T'))
              (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
           (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c = 
?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C] 
           (functor_identity C)) H) 
          (pr1 T') c))

        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))

    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise

       (make_cocone

          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c =

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧

  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]

# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) = ?f'

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧

:

  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =

· # Ghat h · rhohat

?f' =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))

       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
τ_part_of_alg_mor_inst: # H β0 · τ (pr1 T') =
τ IA · β0
?f' =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
τ_part_of_alg_mor_inst_Zc: (# H β0 · τ (pr1 T'))
  (pr1 Z c) =
(τ IA · β0) (pr1 Z c)
?f' =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (H
        (colim
           (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
              (initChain InitialEndC
                 (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
        (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1
    (colim_algebra_mor InitialEndC
       (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
       (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· colimArrow
    (CC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (initChain InitialEndC
             (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
          (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (pr1 `(pr1 T') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (cocone_pointwise
       (initChain InitialEndC
          (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) `(pr1 T')
       (make_cocone
          (Adamek.cocone_over_alg InitialEndC (pr1 T'))
          (isCoconeOverAlg InitialEndC (pr1 T')))
       (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

        apply τ_part_of_alg_mor_inst_Zc.
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
(# H β0 · τ (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T')
       (pr1 Z c))
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
        (H `(pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T')
       (pr1 Z c))
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
        (H `(pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)))
   · (alg_map
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T')
        (pr1 Z c)
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
        (H `(pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)))
   · (alg_map
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T')
        (pr1 Z c)
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
           [C, C] 
           [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] 
           [C, C, C] 
           (functor_identity C)) H) 
          (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
        (H `(pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)))
   · (alg_map
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T')
        (pr1 Z c)
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c)) =
?b

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)

     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H `(pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)
   · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c) =
?t2

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧

  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]

  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H `(pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
fbracket_τ_inst: theta H (`T' ⊗ Z)
· # H
    (fbracket T'
       (f
        · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
· τ T' =
τ T' •• U Z
· fbracket T'
    (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)
?t2 =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H `(pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
fbracket_τ_inst_c: (theta H (`T' ⊗ Z)
 · # H
     (fbracket T'
        (f
         · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H
           β0)) · 
 τ T') c =
(τ T' •• U Z
 · fbracket T'
     (f
      · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
  c
?t2 =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c))
     (H `(pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') (pr1 Z c)
· fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) c

        apply fbracket_τ_inst_c.
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· (theta H (`T' ⊗ Z)
   · # H
       (fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
   · τ T') c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· (theta H (`(pr1 T') ⊗ Z) c
   · # H
       (fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
       c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c)) =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
     c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      · alg_map

  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧

CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (# H β) · θ (`T' ⊗ Z)
· # H (fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) =
θ (`IA,, Z)
· # H
    (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β
     · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))

  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
Hyp: # (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (# H β) · θ (`T' ⊗ Z)
· # H
    (fbracket T'
       (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) =
θ (`IA,, Z)
· # H
    (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β
     · fbracket T'
         (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) 
  (pr1 Z c) · 
theta H (`(pr1 T') ⊗ Z) c
· # H (fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· # H
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
     · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
Hyp: # (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (# H β) · θ (`T' ⊗ Z)
· # H
    (fbracket T'
       (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) =
θ (`IA,, Z)
· # H
    (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β
     · fbracket T'
         (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c) · theta H (`(pr1 T') ⊗ Z) c
· # H (fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· # H
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
     · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
Hyp_c: (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (# H β) · θ (`T' ⊗ Z)
 · # H
     (fbracket T'
        (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))) c =
(θ (`IA,, Z)
 · # H
     (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β
      · fbracket T'
          (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))) c
# H
  (Adamek.ad InitialEndC
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)))
     (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c) · theta H (`(pr1 T') ⊗ Z) c
· # H (fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· # H
    (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
     · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) c

           exact Hyp_c. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow 
  (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β 
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt H HH Z `T' Ghat rhohat
  (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C]
       ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH),
       `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z))

     (category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)) · h =
thetahat Z f `(category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH)
· # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (# H β) · θ (`T' ⊗ Z)
· # H (fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0)) =
θ (`IA,, Z)
· # H
    (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β
     · fbracket T' (f · ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))

pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (# H β) · θ (`T' ⊗ Z) =
θ (`IA,, Z) · # H (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
c: C
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (# H β) · θ (`T' ⊗ Z)) c =
(θ (`IA,, Z) · # H (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
c: C
θ_nat_1_pointwise_inst: pr1 (# H β) (pr1 Z c)
· pr1 (θ (`T' ⊗ Z)) c =
pr1 (θ (`InitHSS ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1
    (# H
       (β
        ⋆ nat_trans_id
           (pr1 Z))) c
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (# H β) · θ (`T' ⊗ Z)) c =
(θ (`IA,, Z) · # H (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
c: C
θ_nat_1_pointwise_inst: pr1 (# H β) (pr1 Z c)
· pr1 (θ (`T' ⊗ Z)) c =
pr1 (θ (`InitHSS ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1
    (# H
       (β
        ⋆ nat_trans_id
           (pr1 Z))) c
pr1 (θ (`InitHSS ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (β ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 Z))) c =
(θ (`IA,, Z) · # H (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
c: C
pr1 (θ (`InitHSS ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (β ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 Z))) c =
(θ (`IA,, Z) · # H (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) β)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
c: C
pr1
  (θ
     (colim
        (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
           (initChain InitialEndC
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))) ⊗ Z))
  c · pr1 (# H (β ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 Z))) c =
θ
  (colim
     (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
        (initChain InitialEndC
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))),, Z) c
· # H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
c: C
pr1 (# H (β ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 Z))) c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): category_FunctorAlg
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) ⟦ IA, 
pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
c: C
pr1 (# H (β ø pr1 Z)) c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β) c

      apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
∏ T' : hss CP H, hssMor InitHSS T'

  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)

Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss CP H
ishssMor C CP H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'))

apply ishssMor_InitAlg.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss_category CP H
∏ t : hss_category CP H ⟦ InitHSS, T' ⟧,
t = hss_InitMor T'

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss_category CP H
t: hss_category CP H ⟦ InitHSS, T' ⟧
t = hss_InitMor T'


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
T': hss_category CP H
t: hss_category CP H ⟦ InitHSS, T' ⟧
pr1 t = pr1 (hss_InitMor T')

apply (@InitialArrowUnique _ IA (pr1 T') (pr1 t)).
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
InitAlg:= category_Algebra.InitAlg H HH: FunctorAlg (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)
ptdInitAlg:= category_Algebra.ptdInitAlg H HH: Ptd

IA:= colimAlgInitial InitialEndC
  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
  (Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC
     (initChain InitialEndC
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))): Initial
  (category_FunctorAlg
     (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
isInitial (hss_category CP H) InitHSS

  (is_omega_cocont_Id_H H HH)
